feedback.text: I do not want to live in a world where manufacturers and distributors of hardware or software can make a letter harder from a refrigerator, toaster or car on button printing. But unfortunately we arrived in this dystopy! Although the “Purchases” software is marked as such on the button, in small print somewhere on page 23 there are any words redefining “Purchase” to “Please, but only as long as we want”. This must be a final step! When a product is sold, I want to decide on my own when I no longer want to use the purchased product!
